name: Conseil
description: Conseil, rendered in soft, diffuse watercolor, appears as a figure of quiet efficiency. His face, oval-shaped and framed by neatly combed dark brown hair with subtle streaks of teal and Prussian blue blended in, holds an expression of gentle curiosity. His skin is a warm tan, stippled with freckles across the bridge of his nose and high cheekbones. His eyes are a light hazel, almost amber in the right light, and framed by delicate, almost feathery eyelashes. He favors practical, loose-fitting clothing: a beige linen shirt, stained with faint washes of ultramarine and ochre where ink might have spilled, paired with sturdy brown trousers softened with hints of burnt sienna. A worn, leather satchel, the color of aged parchment with brass buckles painted in shimmering gold watercolor, is slung across his chest. Around his neck, he wears a simple cord necklace adorned with a polished ammonite fossil, colored in swirling shades of lavender and slate gray. The overall impression is one of understated intelligence and a deep connection to the natural world, his colors blending seamlessly with the watery backgrounds of the graphic novel.
